user.title: Set up Desk Tracker
user.description: Track how long your monitor is on each day using a smart plug power sensor.

data_description.entity_id: The entity ID of your smart plug power sensor, e.g. sensor.monitor_socket_power
data_description.power_threshold: Power above this value means the monitor is on. Default: 0.5 W
data_description.daily_goal: Your daily desk time target in hours, e.g. 6

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Please check the entity ID.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
